payload.answer: Stored only the fetch failure details and a context note that the URL was considered useful, without persisting any article content.

entity_resolution.reason: Only a URL and a generic user note are provided; no additional entity identifiers are available for normalization.

payload.intent: Extract atomic memory cards from a failed article fetch attempt for a memory architecture evaluation.

memory_cards.statement: Fetching https://example.com/missing returned a 404 network error.
The article URL was referenced as 'useful for memory architecture,' but no article content was retrieved due to the fetch failure.

details: No article content was available due to 404 network error.
Memory cards limited to fetch failure metadata and the user-provided context note.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL with network access or updated headers.
Validate whether the URL is correct or the resource has been moved/deleted.
Provide cached content or an alternative accessible source for memory extraction.
